tool_args.label: Utica Ave Corridor Study Area

payload.description: Utica Ave. Corridor Study Area from Carroll St. to Church Ave. in Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Proposed Bus Lane Relocation to SB Approach

payload.description: Relocates bus lane to southbound approach on Utica Ave near Eastern Parkway; provides more loading between President and Carroll Sts; reduces bus delays on southbound approach to Eastern Parkway; minimal impact on parking spaces
payload.location_text: Utica Ave southbound approach to Eastern Parkway, between President St and Carroll St

normalized_location.raw_text: Utica Ave southbound approach to Eastern Parkway, between President St and Carroll St

tool_args.label: Existing Bus Lane Conditions

payload.description: Existing bus lane on Utica Ave: 7 AM-7 PM bus lane at Union St; 7 AM-10 AM & 4 PM-7 PM bus lane at President St; traffic congestion is worst on approaches to Eastern Parkway
payload.location_text: Utica Ave at Union St and President St

normalized_location.raw_text: Utica Ave at Union St and President St

tool_args.label: Other Improvements: TSP, Signal Timing, Left Turn Bays, Pedestrian Safety

payload.description: Signal timing improvements for all traffic; Transit Signal Priority (TSP) for buses; left turn bays to reduce blockages by turning vehicles; pedestrian safety improvements
